What would someone think of when they heard the word 'angel'? Many people had various images that they'd think of. Most may instantly think of a man or woman clad in white with heavenly wings behind them. Other people's minds may drift to that of the cherub, the small little flying babies. The super niche may even picture those horrifying biblically accurate depictions. But, alas, all were wrong. Angels looked just like humans, as intended by God. Though, they were far more attractive then the average human. Yet even so, Panty and Stocking acted like anything BUT angels. The two sisters from the pearly gates were so bad that they got themselves the boot from Heaven, forced to live out their immortal lives on Earth. That is, until they collected a nondescript amount of 'Heaven Tokens' by slaying evil spirits. Though, laying waste to unholy demons was the LAST thing on either sister's mind. After both girls had their fun at the mall, they'd actually agree on something for once: going to the beach!
